methylmethaqualone.dose_note: NOTE: The drug is reported to have caused a high amount of seizures, caution is strongly recommended.
methylmethaqualone.name: methylmethaqualone

properties.dose: Vapourized/Sublingual Threshold: 2-3mg Light: 3-5mg Common: 5-10mg. Strong: 10-20mg+ | NOTE: The drug is reported to have caused a high amount of seizures, caution is strongly recommended.
properties.effects: Anxiolytic, Sedative, Muscle Relaxant, Amnesia, Dystaxia, Hypnotic.
properties.summary: A more potent analogue of methaqualone with a short duration. The drug is suspected to be  neurotoxic. The drug is reported to have proconvulsive effects.
